  • Method Details

    • findAll

      @Transactional(readOnly=true) public List<Company> findAll()

    • findById

      @Transactional(readOnly=true) public Company findById(Long id, PUser user)

    • getMainAddress

      @Transactional(readOnly=true) public Address getMainAddress(Long id, PUser user)
      Reads the company's main address as a detached copy, initialized inside this transaction. A Vaadin view cannot read the lazy mainAddress off a detached entity (its thread has no open session), so the copy is made here and handed out plain. Returns null if the company has no address.

    • searchCompanies

      public Collection<Company> searchCompanies(Company filter)
